title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 388.250 - Trustees or receivers — rights and powers
text:
388.250.  Trustees or receivers — rights and powers. — Trustees or receivers of railroad companies and corporations and their estates appointed by any court whatsoever owning, holding, operating, controlling or managing any such corporation or company or its estate shall have all the rights and powers possessed by railroad corporations and companies under the laws of Missouri.
(L. 1941 p. 329 § 5289A)
